title: Claude Code Skill: DocSync — Automatic README and API Reference Generator
description: For backend developers, this skill scans codebases and auto-generates structured README files and API reference docs from functions, routes, and comments so they can ship well-documented libraries without writing a single doc line manually
gumroad_description:
You're shipping backend code but your docs are always three sprints behind.

DocSync fixes that. This Claude Code Skill scans your entire codebase and generates accurate, structured README files and API reference docs in minutes—automatically pulling from your functions, routes, and existing comments. No manual writing. No outdated specs. Just ship.

Who this is for:

— Backend developers maintaining open-source libraries who can't afford documentation debt
— Startups shipping APIs fast and need docs to match velocity, not slow the team down
— Teams rebuilding docs after refactors but lacking bandwidth for manual updates

What's inside:

— Complete 13-step configuration guide tailored to your codebase structure
— Ready-to-use SKILL.md template you drop into Claude and run immediately
— Field adaptation instructions for routing libraries, REST APIs, and SDK frameworks
— Output examples showing exactly what auto-generated docs look like

Your documentation stays current. Your team ships faster. Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
